center.name: 卡尔奇省
center.summary: 卡尔奇省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Red-ruffed fruitcrow、Lemon-browed flycatcher、Giant antpitta，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Formerly, it was found (and may still be found in protected habitats) in eastern Carchi and Tungurahua Provinces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: As currently understood, it is found in the Serranía del Perijá on the Colombia-Venezuela border, in the western Venezuelan Andes in Mérida and Trujillo states, spottily in all three ranges of the Colombian Andes, and in extreme northern Ecuador's Carchi Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It has been recently confirmed in southeast Ecuador in Cordillera del Cóndor. Pyroderus scutatus occidentalis is found in the west Andes in Colombia and in the western slope of the central Andes in Colombia to northwest Ecuador, specifically Imbabura, Carchi, and Santo Domingo de los Tsachilas
